description_long: This factory building features a prominent cylindrical cooling tower with a radiation warning sign, suggesting it is a power plant, likely nuclear. The structure includes a tall, striped smokestack at the rear, multiple interconnected rectangular sections, and a variety of industrial frameworks and platforms. Large industrial windows are visible on the side, providing natural light to the interior workspaces. The building sits on a broad, flat base, with several access points and what appears to be a control room or office section. The exterior is primarily white and gray, with orange accents on the smokestack and framework, and the overall design is utilitarian and functional, typical of modern industrial architecture.
description: A modern industrial factory building with a large cooling tower, tall smokestack, and multiple interconnected sections, featuring large windows and industrial frameworks.
description_view_0: Front view showing the cylindrical cooling tower with a radiation sign, main entrance, and large industrial windows.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the cooling tower, extensive orange industrial framework, and the tall smokestack in the background.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the smokestack as the dominant feature, with the cooling tower partially visible and more solid building sections.
description_view_3: Angled rear-side view showing both the cooling tower and smokestack, as well as additional industrial frameworks and platforms.
